title: Create: Perfect World
description: Create: Perfect World is a cozy and immersive modpack focused on aesthetic worldbuilding, exploration, and peaceful survival. Build beautiful homes, explore stunning landscapes, enjoy dynamic seasons, and create your perfect world – one block at a time. 🌿
body:
# 🌿 Create: Perfect World – A Beautiful World Awaits **Create: Perfect World** is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack designed for players who want a more **harmonious**, **immersive**, and **aesthetically rich** experience. Instead of focusing on technical progression or industrial automation, this pack invites you to: - **Build peaceful villages** - **Explore breathtaking landscapes** - **Enjoy a cozy, visually stunning world** Whether you’re wandering through diverse biomes, decorating a cottage, or enjoying seasonal rhythms — *Create: Perfect World* offers a **relaxing and creatively fulfilling** Minecraft journey. ---
## ✨ Key Features ### 🌍 A World Worth Exploring - Explore worlds shaped by **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, **Continents**, and **Biomes O’ Plenty** - Natural landscapes: lush forests, wide shorelines, and towering mountains ### 🌱 Living Nature - **Serene Seasons**: dynamic weather & seasonal effects - **Dynamic Trees**, **Terraphilic**, and **Ocean’s Delight** create realistic ecosystems - **Immersive Sounds** + **Sound Physics Remastered** enhance the atmosphere ### 🏡 Build with Beauty in Mind - Shape and decorate with **Create**, **Rechiseled**, **Diagonal Walls/Fences/Windows**, and **Fusion CTM** - Add detail with **3D Skin Layers**, **EnhancedVisuals**, and **Spawn Animations** ### 🍽 Cozy Survival & Farming - Culinary exploration with **Farmer’s Delight**, **End’s Delight**, **Ocean’s Delight**, and **Create: Central Kitchen** - Survival enriched with meaningful food, farming, and tool systems ### 🎮 Quality of Life - Tools: **Nature’s Compass**, **Mouse Tweaks**, **Carry On**, **Jade**, **Cherished Worlds** - Multiplayer-ready: **No Chat Reports**, **Open Parties and Claims**, **Lootr** ---
## 📦 Embedded Dependencies & Core Mods This modpack runs on **NeoForge for Minecraft 1.21.1**. All required libraries are included for convenience. Key Mods & Libraries: - **Create** & Addons: *Food*, *Dragons Plus*, *Integrated Farming*, *Central Kitchen*, *Copycats+* - **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, **Biomes O’ Plenty**, **Continents**, **Geophilic** - **Serene Seasons**, **Dynamic Trees+**, **Terraphilic** - **Farmer’s Delight** and expansions - **Distant Horizons** for extended terrain rendering - **Immersive Sounds**, **EnhancedVisuals**, **3D Skin Layers** - Core libraries: *Architectury*, *Cloth Config*, *MidnightLib*, *Puzzles Lib*, *Moonlight*, etc. > 🧾 Full mod list available inside the modpack launcher. ---
## 🌐 Who Is This Pack For? **Create: Perfect World** is ideal if you: - Prefer **building** over **automation** - Love **peaceful**, **beautiful survival gameplay** - Enjoy **worldbuilding, decorating, and aesthetics** - Want a **cozy, creative, and relaxing** multiplayer or solo experience ---
## 🚀 Getting Started 1. Install a NeoForge-compatible launcher (Prism, CurseForge, MultiMC) 2. Search for **Create: Perfect World** 3. Launch and play — no extra setup required --- > 🎨 **Create: Perfect World** is not just a modpack — it’s an **experience**. > Build with intention. Explore with wonder. Create your perfect world.
